title: Director, Information Technology
description_text: Lead enterprise IT operations, infrastructure, business systems, security governance, vendor management, and annual planning for a distributed organization.
notes: Strong direct fit for the executive IT leader profile.

title: Senior Director, Enterprise Applications
description_text: Own enterprise applications, ERP strategy, business systems modernization, and application support leadership across multiple business units.
notes: Strong fit in enterprise apps leadership.

title: Program Director, Digital Transformation
description_text: Drive transformation initiatives across operations, systems, and vendor workstreams with heavy executive coordination and portfolio governance.

title: Vice President, Sales
description_text: Lead enterprise sales strategy, territory growth, forecasting, and sales leadership management.

title: HR Manager
description_text: Lead employee relations, HR policies, recruiting coordination, and benefits administration.
